prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Moonvale (androgynous ranger, green half-cape, leaf brooch) and Yuna Ironleaf (feminine ranger, green half-cape, leaf brooch) working together at an anvil. Yuna Moonvale holds a glowing beast core steady while Yuna Ironleaf uses a fine-tipped trap-disarming tool to calibrate the energy flow into a piece of ranger gear. Warm, cinematic lighting, focused on their cooperative hands and intent expressions, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild forge shot; Yuna Ironleaf and Yuna Moonvale complete the calibration as the beast core pulses with a soft light. Yuna Ironleaf slides the tool out and Yuna Moonvale secures the gear, both rangers nodding in silent satisfaction as the tool clicks into place. Consistent camera angle and character appearances, no text, no watermark.
